grant_title: Yates County Youth Bureau Grant Information
project_area: Youth development programs and youth sports funding (physical recreation, team sports, educational support, wellness, civic engagement, family support, juvenile delinquency prevention, crisis intervention, respite services)
demographic_requirements: Under-resourced youth under age 18, traditionally underserved or disadvantaged populations, trans or gender-nonconforming youth, girls in sports, youth with disabilities and adaptive needs, smaller grass-roots organizations
eligibility_summary: Funding is available for youth development programs and youth sports initiatives in Yates County, NY. Youth development funding supports community-level services promoting positive youth development (e.g., wellness, education, family support, delinquency prevention). Youth sports funding (YSEF and YTS) targets under-resourced youth, with YSEF supporting general sports/physical activities and YTS focusing on team sports, infrastructure, and scholarships. Eligible applicants include local organizations, municipalities, nonprofits, and youth bureaus.
